companies.name: Cisco
companies.reason: Options traders are treating Cisco like a new meme stock ahead of this week's earnings, making the legacy networking giant a fresh focus in tech news.

companies.name: OpenAI
companies.reason: OpenAI said it created a new unit with a $4 billion investment to support its corporate AI push, drawing major attention in technology news.

companies.name: Intel
companies.reason: Intel shares surged on reports of a preliminary agreement to make Apple chips, putting the company in the center of semiconductor news.

companies.name: Apple
companies.reason: Apple is trending because of reports tied to a preliminary chip-making agreement with Intel and broader attention around its chip strategy.

companies.name: Microsoft
companies.reason: Microsoft remains in the news for its Maia 200 AI chip and continued in-house AI infrastructure efforts.

companies.name: Alphabet
companies.reason: Alphabet is trending for its AI infrastructure and cloud expansion, including Google’s custom AI chip strategy and major cloud demand.

companies.name: AMD
companies.reason: AMD is attracting attention after forecasting revenue above expectations on strong demand for AI products, which pushed its shares sharply higher.
